body:
LGTM — Clean completion of the metadata factory refactoring. The PR correctly applies the established `ToolDefinition` → factory pattern to the Finish tool and replaces ~200 lines of hand-written JSON manifests with `generateToolManifest()` calls.

Key verifications:
- `exclusive: true` properly wired through `ToolDefinition` → `createGadgetClass` → llmist `Gadget()`, confirmed by the existing `finish.test.ts` assertion
- `PMUpdateChecklistItem`/`PMDeleteChecklistItem` name fix aligns definitions with the capability registry
- `deriveCLICommand` correctly strips the `PM` prefix to avoid `cascade-tools pm pm-update-checklist-item`
- The dropped `no-includeComments` manifest entry is benign — `buildToolGuidance` already derives the `--no-` form from `default: true`
- All 13 manifest tests, 13 Finish tests, and 52 factory tests pass; typecheck clean
